videos.headline: Liberty strikes first with a 17-yard TD
videos.description: Liberty's Kaidon Salter drops a dime to Bentley Hanshaw for a 17-yard touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Liberty strikes first with a 17-yard TD) 2024/01/01 ESHEET

videos.headline: Bo Nix rips one to Gary Bryant for an Oregon TD
videos.description: Oregon takes the lead as Bo Nix ropes a pass to Gary Bryant Jr. for a touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Bo Nix rips one to Gary Bryant for an Oregon TD) 2024/01/01 ESHEET

videos.headline: Bo Nix works his magic on 2-yard TD
videos.description: Bo Nix avoids multiple tacklers and finds Terrance Ferguson for a 2-yard touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Bo Nix works his magic on 2-yard TD) 2024/01/01 ESHEET

videos.headline: Bo Nix breaks Marcus Mariota's Oregon TD record
videos.description: Bo Nix throws a short shovel pass to Kenyon Sadiq for a touchdown, giving him the all-time touchdown pass record at Oregon.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Bo Nix breaks Marcus Mariota's Oregon TD record) 2024/01/01 ESHEET

videos.headline: Oregon gets the turnover as they grab the INT off the drop
videos.description: Liberty receiver has the ball go through his hands and Oregon's Steve Stephens IV is there for the interception.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Oregon gets the turnover as they grab the INT off the drop) 2024/01/01 ESHEET

videos.headline: Bo Nix finds a sliding Traeshon Holden for a 17-yard TD
videos.description: Bo Nix throws his fourth touchdown of the first half as he finds Traeshon Holden for a 17-yard touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Bo Nix finds a sliding Traeshon Holden for a 17-yard TD) 2024/01/01 ESHEET

videos.headline: Oregon goes with some trickeration to find the end zone
videos.description: Oregon goes with a flea-flicker screen pass to find Tez Johnson for a 24-yard touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Oregon goes with some trickeration to find the end zone) 2024/01/01 ESHEET

videos.headline: Bucky Irving piles on for Oregon with short rushing TD
videos.description: Bucky Irving scores from 1-yard out, giving Oregon a 45-6 lead in the fourth quarter.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Bucky Irving piles on for Oregon with short rushing TD) 2024/01/01 ESHEET

videos.headline: Bo Nix gets a standing ovation as he jogs off the field for the final time
videos.description: Bo Nix gets a curtain call and gets a standing ovation from Oregon fans including his wife and parents.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Bo Nix gets a standing ovation as he jogs off the field for the final time) 2024/01/01 ESHEET
